name: Cherry Coke Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cherries and their juice to boiling.
2. Remove from heat and add jello.
3. Stir until dissolved.
4. Add pineapple, juice, and all ingredients.
5. Pour into an oiled 6-cup mold.
6. Let cool, then refrigerate at least 2 hours or until set.
7. Serve cold.
